name: Langdock
description: Enterprise LLM workspace and API platform for multi-model AI governance.

seo.title: Langdock — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Langdock: Enterprise LLM workspace and API platform for multi-model AI governance.

when_to_use: Deploying LLM-powered internal tools with enterprise security
Building team chatbots connected to internal knowledge bases
Managing LLM access and permissions across organization teams
Creating AI workflows that connect to Slack, Jira, and Confluence

pros: EU-based, strong on GDPR and data residency
Clean admin controls for enterprise rollouts
cons: Overlaps with ChatGPT Enterprise and Glean
review.verdict: A sensible EU-first AI workspace for companies that reject US-hosted LLM admin tools.
review.best_for: European enterprises needing governed multi-model AI with GDPR compliance
review.not_for: Teams happy with ChatGPT Enterprise or Microsoft Copilot

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Standard subscription/seat plan; downgradable next cycle.
